allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const deps = {...p.dependencies, ...p.devDependencies}; Object.keys\(deps\).filter\(k => k.includes\('dnd'\) || k.includes\('drag'\) || k.includes\('sortable'\)\).forEach\(k => console.log\(k, deps[k]\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('next:', p.dependencies.next, 'react:', p.dependencies.react\)")
